title: A Weekend to Remember
article_text: Last weekend, my daughter and I had a wonderful time. In the previous week, we planned to perform a song together. I needed to earn some money, so I worked hard at my job. My daughter likes to imagine she is a professional singer. She wrote a new song and showed it to me. I read a post in the newspaper about a music debate. The debate was about who can define a good song. We came to the conclusion that everybody has their own taste. I checked the clock and saw it was almost dark. The memory of that weekend will stay with me forever because we had so much fun.

sentences.en: Last weekend, my daughter and I had a wonderful time.
sentences.zh: 上个周末，我和女儿度过了一段美好的时光。

sentences.en: In the previous week, we planned to perform a song together.
sentences.zh: 在前一周，我们计划一起表演一首歌。

words and music that you sing

sentences.zh: 我女儿喜欢想象她是一名职业歌手。

doing something as a job, not as a hobby

sentences.zh: 她写了一首新歌并给我看。

sentences.en: I read a post in the newspaper about a music debate.
sentences.zh: 我在报纸上读到一篇关于音乐辩论的帖子。

words.eng_def: something written on the internet or in a newspaper
a discussion where people give different opinions

sentences.en: The debate was about who can define a good song.
sentences.zh: 这场辩论是关于谁能定义一首好歌。

words.eng_def: a discussion where people give different opinions

sentences.en: We came to the conclusion that everybody has their own taste.
sentences.zh: 我们得出结论，每个人都有自己的品味。

sentences.en: I checked the clock and saw it was almost dark.
sentences.zh: 我看了看钟，发现天几乎黑了。

sentences.en: The memory of that weekend will stay with me forever because we had so much fun.
sentences.zh: 那个周末的记忆将永远留在我心中，因为我们玩得很开心。
